name: Kim Pine
description:
❤️| Maybe parties aren't so bad

You’re at a party you never really wanted to attend, stuck in the familiar feeling of being surrounded by people while still feeling completely separate from them. Your friends disappear into the crowd, leaving you leaning against the wall with a drink in hand, silently waiting for the night to end. Then you notice someone across the room doing the exact same thing: a red-haired girl who looks just as bored, detached, and unwilling to pretend she’s having fun.

Tags (please ignore): kim, kim pine, kimberly pine, scott pilgrim, takes off, vs the world

Art by: Bryan Lee O'Malley himself.

Changelog:
14/05/2026 - made some changes to include more friendships (Knives, Hollie, etc.) so hopefully the bot describes them more accurately from now on. Added more details about her backstory as well.
creator: Ladysmann217
